title: lotus corniculatus var. pedunculatus
intro: Lotus corniculatus var. pedunculatus, also known as the greater bird's-foot trefoil, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lotus corniculatus var. pedunculatus include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
